title: Retry amplification consumed authentication connection pool
failure_mechanism: A reduced connection timeout during elevated database load amplified retries, consuming application connection-pool capacity and causing new instances to fail database connection checks.
mitigation_summary: Failure pressure subsided only after connection acquisition behavior and retry volume stabilized; the historical record does not prescribe changing a timeout during a new incident.
timeline_summary: A configuration change preceded rising connection waits. Authentication failures and readiness failures appeared while retries increased under database stress.
narrative_safe: RelayOps authentication instances struggled to acquire database connections after a configuration change during elevated load. This may resemble a worker deployment failure, but pool acquisition evidence must be checked before choosing a procedure.
